summary: Saturday session. Markets closed Friday at all-time highs (S&P 7,580, 9th consecutive winning week). US-Iran ceasefire unsigned — binary risk for Monday open. BTC weak ($73.1K) with 6-day ETF outflow streak. XAG Patient position healthy at +1.02%. FOMC June 16 is next major event.

XAG-USD.note: June seasonal weakness. Patient holds 53.84oz @ $74.68 avg.

XAU-USD.note: Iran deal binary: deal=$4400, collapse=$4600+. Central bank bid 190t/quarter.

BTC-USD.note: Below max pain $75K. ETF outflows $2.54B in 2 weeks. NFP June 5 is catalyst.

ETH-USD.note: Below max pain $2,200. Underperforming BTC. Funding rates neutral-to-negative.

MSTR.note: +5% Friday. 411 BTC transferred to Coinbase — sell speculation.

trade_ideas.rationale: Patient position 53.84oz at $74.68 avg (+1.02%). June seasonal weakness argues against adding. Wait for 12h TF BUY alignment or breakout above $77.50. ATR stop ~$74.81 provides cushion.
Ranging $72-75K for 2+ weeks. ETF outflows severe. Need $75K reclaim with volume + 12h BUY alignment before entry. NFP June 5 could be catalyst for directional move.

system_improvements_completed: Reverted Qwen3/Ministral confidence calibration map — was causing 28.2% accuracy collapse (was 59.6%). Both LLM signals restored to raw confidence passthrough.
Fixed contract violation false positives — 21 false violations/week suppressed by checking invocation success+journal_written status.
Added 2 regression tests for the contract fix.

system_improvements_proposed.title: ETF flow momentum signal
system_improvements_proposed.description: Track BTC spot ETF net flows as new signal module. Currently strongest single predictor for BTC.

system_improvements_proposed.title: VIX-Rank continuous vol scaling
system_improvements_proposed.description: Replace discrete regime multipliers (0.75/0.80) with continuous (1-vol_rank) scaling. GVZ already fetched for metals.

system_improvements_proposed.title: Walk-forward validation for IC weighting
system_improvements_proposed.description: ArXiv 2601.05716 shows adaptive in-sample weights fail OOS. Any IC-weighting must use strict walk-forward validation.

system_improvements_proposed.title: Gold-silver pair trade with Kalman filter
system_improvements_proposed.description: Add cointegration-based dynamic hedge ratio to coordinate XAU/XAG warrant entries.

system_improvements_proposed.title: Berry Phase Rate regime detector
system_improvements_proposed.description: Geometric regime detection orthogonal to existing 6 regime signals. Novel but complex implementation.

risk_warnings: US-Iran ceasefire deal unsigned — Monday gap risk across all instruments. Oil could drop 5%+ on deal or spike 10%+ on collapse.
BTC spot ETF outflows accelerating — YTD net inflows at just $536M, risk of going negative. If institutional sentiment turns, $70K support may not hold.
FOMC June 16 — NFP on June 5 will set expectations. Strong jobs = hawkish repricing = crypto and metals pressure.
Qwen3 signal restored from calibration revert but underlying BUY-side accuracy (33.2%) remains structurally weak. Monitor for regression.
June seasonal weakness for silver historically -2.1% average monthly return.
research_highlights: AlphaCrafter (ArXiv 2605.05580): Multi-agent framework with IC decay monitoring + regime-conditioned ensemble selection. Directly applicable to planned IC weighting upgrade.
Friction-adjusted Kelly for gold futures (ArXiv 2511.08571): Sharpe 2.88 walk-forward. Position sizing formula adaptable to XAU warrant trading.
5-signal BTC on-chain convergence (Glassnode): MVRV 1.2, aSOPR <1.0, hashrate -22%, exchange reserves 7yr low. Has preceded 300%+ rallies 3/3 times historically.
STH Realized P/L normalized by Realized Cap — higher-resolution NUPL for new capital flow detection. Could improve on-chain signal.
